jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Hypercity
jsonLd.description:
We at Hypercity are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Kanpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hypercity:
Hypercity is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hypercity!
